title: Sam Altman says India created over 1 billion images with ChatGPT Images 2.0: Here are top top trends and prompts
snippet: OpenAI's ChatGPT Images 2.0 has generated over a billion images in India within a month of its release. Check out the top trending prompts

title: Is your iPhone battery draining after iOS 26.5 update? Here’s why you don't need to panic just yet
snippet: iOS 26.5 users are reporting significant battery drain and overheating issues after the update. Several users on social media are raising concerns that the new update is causing their Apple iPhones to heat up.

title: Two years after announcement, Apple’s new Siri to still launch in ‘beta’ with fresh privacy features: Report
snippet: The upcoming iOS 27 is expected to introduce a revamped Siri but with the ‘beta’ lable. Apple is also said to be focusing on adding privacy controls to the Siri chatbot like auto-deleting chat history and limited memory retention.

title: Redmi Turbo 5 vs OnePlus Nord 6: Which is the best gaming phone under  ₹40,000?
snippet: The mid-range smartphone market is getting more competitive, with Xiaomi getting set to introduce the Redmi Turbo 5 which will take on the likes of OnePlus Nord 6.&nbsp;Here's a detailed comparison of both phones.

title: Redmi Turbo 5 India launch soon: Expected specs, price, features and availability
snippet: The Redmi Turbo 5 is confirmed to launch in India soon. The phone is expected to come with a &nbsp;6.59-inch OLED display, MediaTek Dimensity 8500-Ultra processor, and a dual rear camera setup.

title: Google I/O 2026 kicks off next week: How to watch live-stream, full schedule and what to expect
snippet: Google will host its I/O 2026 event at Shoreline Amphitheatre next week. The company is expected to maintain its focus on AI upgrades after already unveling Android upgrades earlier this month.

title: Instagram users want Instants gone: Why the new feature is sparking privacy fears and how to turn it off

title: Google reveals why it is slashing 15GB of free Google Drive storage down to 5GB for new users
snippet: Google has updated its account storage policy, offering new users only 5GB of Google Drive storage unless they add a phone number. The company has now finally broken its silence on the new changes.

title: OnePlus suddenly pauses latest OxygenOS 16 update: here's what happened
snippet: OnePlus has suspended OxygenOS 16.0.7.XXX and 16.0.5.XXX updates due to issues causing abnormal restarts for some users. The company says it is investigating the problems and plans to resume the rollout once resolved

title: Xiaomi 17 Max launching soon: 200MP LEICA camera, 8,000mAh battery and LTPO AMOLED display confirmed
snippet: Xiaomi will be launching the Xiaomi 17 Max in China soon, The flagship phone will features an 8,000mAh battery, 100W fast charging, a 6.9-inch 2K display, and a LEICA powered camera setup with a 200MP primary shooter.&nbsp;

China's CXMT expects revenue to surge as memory chip demand soars
snippet: China's top memory chipmaker, CXMT, anticipates first-half revenue around $17.62 billion, driven by a global memory supercycle fueled by AI demand. The company expects net profit up to 57 billion yuan, showcasing significant growth with first-quarter revenue soaring over 700% year-on-year.

title: FDE emerges hottest role in AI market, commands big pay premium
snippet: The forward deployed engineer (FDE) has emerged as the hottest job in AI, with companies like OpenAI and Google offering substantial compensation. These consultants are crucial for deploying AI agents and identifying high-impact use cases within organizations.

title: India unprepared as AI memory crunch looks set to deepen: Micron CBO
snippet: A top Micron executive warns the global semiconductor memory shortage, fueled by the AI boom, is severe and could extend beyond 2028. snippet: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi anticipates India becoming its largest market in a decade, highlighting dynamic growth and talent. The company is investing in tech centres and a data centre partnership with Adani Group, while exploring logistics and local commerce opportunities.

title: The world is on track to miss its health targets
snippet: Every year the World Health Organization publishes a global health statistics report. It features the numbers behind world health trends and, importantly, assesses whether we’re on track to reach ambitious goals set in 2015. It’s a bit like a health grade. The 2026 report was published on Wednesday.

title: The shock of seeing your body used in deepfake porn
snippet: When Jennifer got a job doing research for a nonprofit in 2023, she ran her new professional headshot through a facial recognition program.
